name: Buffalo Balls
recipeIngredient: 12 whole jalapeno peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3 cups harissa sauce.
2. Form the mixture into balls.
3. Bake at 400°F until well done.
4. Coat in your favorite Buffalo Wing Sauce recipe.
(I particularly enjoy homemade Harissa Sauce).
